name: RibbonOffsetParameters
summary: Advanced parameters for RibbonOffset Parameters mimic the RibbonOffset Command.

constructors.name: RibbonOffsetParameters
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RibbonOffsetParameters class

properties.name: AlignCrossSections
properties.summary: When false: cross section slashes between input and output curve are located at the ends of ruled spans. When true: cross section slashes between input and output curve are located at the mid points of ruled spans and blends.

properties.name: BlendRadius
properties.summary: Positive, typically the same as distance. When the offset results in a self-intersection that gets trimmed off at a kink, the kink will be blended out using this radius.

properties.name: OffsetDistance
properties.summary: Offset curve distance from input curve.

properties.name: OffsetPlaneVector3d
properties.summary: A vector that indicates the normal of the plane in which the offset will occur. This vector is typically similar to a logical extrude direction for the closed input curve.

properties.name: OffsetTolerance
properties.summary: Used to determine self-intersections of offset curve, not offset error.

properties.name: RebuildPointCount
properties.summary: Rebuild offset curve with defined number of control points 0 for disabled

properties.name: RefitTolerance
properties.summary: Refit the offset curve to a specified tolerance 0 for disabled

properties.name: RibbonSurfaceGenerationMethod
properties.summary: 0 - no surfaces will be created, curves only 1 - Simple Sweep 2 2 - Sweep 2 mixed with NetworkSrf corners
